name: Platinum Customer Rule
description: Membership of the platinum commercial segment.

name: Strategic Account Rule
expression: customer.segment = 'platinum' AND flagged strategic by account management

name: High-Risk Supplier Rule
description: Procurement risk score at or above the supplier risk threshold.

name: Risky Customer Rule
description: More than 60 days late on each of the last three invoices.

name: Unreconciled Revenue Rule
expression: sum(revenueEntry.amount WHERE reconciled = false) > materiality threshold
description: Unreconciled revenue per business unit above the materiality threshold.
